ab: minusa’ cu ki’ yaba’ mi mitaal ’i’ mama’ mu cu’ hisa’.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: mapangih ku’ kukuy ni’ mama’ la.
kalun cami niya’ maha’, mabuka’ ru kiya’ qutux a’ kug cku’ rinamuwaag na’ imuwaag.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: kiya’ kabalay cu’ rinamuwaag na’ imuwaag ’i’ hiya’ ga’, asi papsihuwaw cku’ rinamuwaag na’ imuwaag.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: rasun ni’ yaba’ ku’ hi’ na’ kating ru pinnong. sibiq niya’ ’i’ mama’ la.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: maskakaru’ cu ki’ mama’ cku’ qaqilpan. payux ku’ sikaal cu niya’ ka’ kus.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: ini cu pagiyay na’ ga’, tarahuwalun cu ni’ mama’ maha’, ibabawiq ru ara’ruwa’ si’ magbatunux la.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: kumaal cu maha, “ atuna balaiq ku’ kukuy ni’ mama’ la ga’, ma’uwah ’i’ maganaw ’i’ imuwaag mu babaw niya’ uwi. ”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, \"When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us.\"
